articles.title: The Dark Matter Economics of Claude Code
articles.description: Most of what you pay for is invisible to the UI. This is the field guide to seeing it plus a small open toolkit that surfaces it.

articles.title: The Simulacrum of Sapience: Intelligence Performed, Never Possessed
articles.description: The convergent case from philosophy, neuroscience, and machine learning that eloquent intermediate tokens are the alibi, not the act

articles.title: The 2026 Transformer Efficiency Revolution: Four Papers, One Coherent Argument
articles.description: There is a particular kind of scientific excitement that happens when four separate research groups, working independently, end up converging on the same structural problem from four different directions and their papers, read together, tell a story none of them intended to tell alone.
